reference: The hospital put fourteen stitches in my calf after cutting it on a fence. I also have a puncture and swelling on my shin with some swelling on my ankle. This happened exactly a week ago. My wound check indicated no infection. I continue to use ice on the shin area on and off throughout the day and keep the wound clean. I have not been moving it because it hurts. Since it has been a week, should I try moving it or using it, or should I wait until I get the stitches out in about five days?
text: The hospital put 14 stitches in my calf after cutting it on the fence. I also have a picture of swelling on my chin with some swelling on my ankle. This happened exactly a week ago. My wound type indicated no infection. I continue to use ice on the shin area on and off throughout the day, and keep the wound clean up. I have not been moving it because it hurts. Since it has been a week, should I try moving it, or should I wait until I get the stitches out in about 5 days?
